overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game, following a character with green hair through a neon-lit urban alleyway at night. The scene transitions from a graffiti-covered courtyard down through an underpass into a narrow commercial street lined with food stalls and illuminated by vibrant neon signage.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow alleyway covered in vibrant graffiti, with a large purple mural dominating the right wall. The camera follows a character with green hair as they walk past concrete barriers and scattered debris toward a stairwell leading downward.

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a dimly lit concrete underpass with red ambient lighting and industrial metal walkways overhead. The camera follows the character through the enclosed corridor as they approach the exit where neon lights become visible in the distance.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens into a vibrant cyberpunk alley illuminated by neon signs and red paper lanterns. The camera tilts up to reveal towering buildings with overhead walkways, then focuses on a food stall where a vendor stands behind a counter filled with cooking equipment and stacked plates.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a gritty, graffiti-strewn alleyway through a dark industrial underpass and into a vibrant, neon-lit commercial street. It begins by following a green-haired character past concrete barriers and a large purple mural, moving steadily toward a descending stairwell. As the character enters the underpass, the environment shifts into a dimly lit concrete corridor defined by red ambient lighting and overhead metal walkways. The scene then opens from the enclosed tunnel into a bustling cyberpunk alley illuminated by red paper lanterns and glowing signage, with the camera tilting upward to reveal towering buildings and overhead walkways. Finally, the movement settles on a detailed food stall where a vendor stands behind a counter filled with cooking equipment and stacked plates.
